name: shamela-mcpb
description: MCPB (MCP Bundle) for searching a local Maktabah al-Shamela 4 install from Claude Desktop.

scripts.build:server: esbuild src/server/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --loader:.wasm=binary --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:java
